SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar May-02-2016 Discharged

SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar Apr-21-2016 Continued To May-02-16 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 506

SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar Feb-18-2016 Discharged

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-04-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday, June 4, 2015 in Department 525:
Local Mission Market Llc, Appellant/Defendant appears by Yaron Milgrom-Elcott/Owner and also as Propria Persona.
Claddagh Refigeration Co., Inc., Respondent/Plaintiff appears by John Coyne/President.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.
John Coyne testifies on behalf of Claddagh Refigeration Co., Inc. The following documentary evidence transferred from Small Claims Department are introduced: 11/7/2013 e-mail, invice statement, invoice 2546, invoice 2547, invoice 2548, invoice 2970, invoice 3136, invoice 3137.

Yaron Milgrom-Elcott testifies on his behalf of Local Mission Market Llc. The following documentary evidence transferred from Small Claims Department are introduced: invoice 29457 NA-6, Restaurant Fixtures price list dated 2/10/2013, signed 12/2/13 written warranty, 01/13/2015 Chris Scott e-mail, 11/1/2013 Christopher Riedell e-mail.

Parties responds to questions from the Court

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. The exhibits tranferred from Small Claims Department retained by the Court.

Judge Elliott Myles; Clerk J. Kong; matter not reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Apr-01-2015 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jan-21-2015 Reset From Feb-24-15 To Mar-24-15 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 506
